sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Gupna bukim ong pia Jehovah Pasian
Dikna tawh hong tuam Jehovah Tsidkenu

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Ka sapna teng hong sik Jehovah Jireh
Ama min ading thuman lampi ah

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Topa'n hiteh hong cih leh hipah hiteh
Topa'n neiteh hong cih leh a nei hiteh
Topa'n bawlthei hong cih leh hi pah hi

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa'n damteh hong cih leh a dam hi teh
Topa;n hauteh hong cih leh a hau hi teh
Sihding natding lau na pan hong gum hi
